description_long: This government building features a grand, symmetrical facade with three prominent sections, each topped with green domed roofs and decorative crenellations. The central section is accentuated by a large arched entrance flanked by columns and detailed stonework, while the side wings are slightly recessed and also feature arched windows and ornate parapets. The exterior walls are clad in a light stone or stucco finish, with tall, narrow windows providing rhythm and vertical emphasis. A long colonnaded portico runs along the rear, supported by numerous slender columns, suggesting a formal and ceremonial function. The building includes a secondary entrance with a staircase and canopy, and the overall design is monumental, evoking a sense of authority and civic importance. The architectural style is characterized by historicist elements, with influences from Moorish Revival and Neo-Mudejar traditions.
description: A grand, historicist government building with green domed roofs, ornate stonework, and a prominent arched entrance. The structure features symmetrical wings, decorative crenellations, and a long colonnaded portico.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main entrance with its large archway, flanked by columns and detailed stonework, as well as the symmetrical wings and green domed roofs.
description_view_1: This angle reveals the secondary entrance with a staircase and canopy on the right, along with the ornate parapets and arched windows of the side wings.
description_view_2: The rear of the building is visible here, showcasing the extensive colonnaded portico supported by slender columns and the full length of the symmetrical structure.
description_view_3: This view emphasizes the long portico and the repeating rhythm of columns along the back, as well as the decorative roofline and domed corners.
attribute_public_entrance_design: The main public entrance features a grand arched doorway framed by ornate columns and decorative stonework, set atop a modest platform. The entrance is wide and imposing, designed to convey authority and welcome visitors with a sense of ceremony.
